Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the Global Immunology Conference. My name is Robert, and I am part of the organizing team. Here is some information for your day. The first session starts at nine o'clock, in the main room. Our first speaker is Doctor Silva, from São Paulo, and she is going to talk about new treatments in dermatology. After lunch, we have a panel with four experts. They are going to discuss market access in Latin America. And tonight, at seven, we have a networking dinner. This is a great moment to meet new colleagues and to catch up with the old ones. So please, do not stay alone. Go and break the ice. Enjoy the conference.

Hi Emmanuele, it's Claire, from the Global team. I saw your name on the conference list, and it is so good to know you are coming. Listen, I am going to be at the dinner tonight, and I really want to catch up with you. We only see each other once in a while, so let's not miss it. Also, I want to mention one thing. The VP of Immunology is going to be there too, and he loves to talk about the Brazilian market. It is a great chance to break the ice with him. Come and find me at seven. See you tonight.

Hi, I'm Emmanuele. Nice to meet you. Have you been to this conference before? I work at Sanofi Brazil. Right now, we are launching a new product in dermatology. It was great to catch up. Let's stay in touch.
